long_description:
NRE were alerted of link errors incrementing between cbs02.eq01.dal03 et-3/0/12 <-> cbs01.tl01.atl01 et-0/0/59. Raising this INC to track progress.


https://github.ibm.com/IaaS-NRE/nreincidents/issues/19786
close_notes: Circuits are up. Provider engaged for RFO
